# Known Issues

## Low/Watch — Dense async lifecycle function needs care when changing state transitions
- where: `src/job.ts:128-253`
- problem: `startAsyncJobWithDeps` coordinates threshold gating, ready replacement, preparation, snapshotting, timeout, async success, async failure, and apply triggering in one dense state-machine function.
- recommendation: keep lifecycle tests mandatory for any change here; if the function grows further, split mechanical transition helpers without changing behavior.

## Watch — Pi preparation clone must stay parity-tested
- where: `src/preparation.ts:14-129`, `src/utils.ts:117-147`, `src/index.test.ts:7-12`
- problem: preparation and token accounting intentionally mirror Pi private internals; upgrades can desync behavior.
- recommendation: keep parity sentinels and switch to public Pi exports if `prepareCompaction()` / `estimateContextTokens()` become available.

## Watch — Test-only private Pi deep import may break on package layout changes
- where: `src/index.test.ts:7-12`
- problem: parity tests import a private file from `node_modules` because Pi does not publicly export the needed sentinel functions.
- recommendation: keep the test-only comment; switch to public exports if available rather than removing parity coverage.
